name: 3pc Pasadena Patio Chat Set Gray - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Kick back and relax on your patio with a friend or loved one with this 3-Piece Pasadena Patio Chat Set from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This patio seating set includes two armchairs and an accent table, all designed in natural brown colors. The chairs have wicker-weave seats and backs and come with loose seat and back cushions, while the accent table features a round, slatted tabletop. Best of all, all three pieces are designed with a weather-resistant construction that makes them suitable for year-round use.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
